title: Manderon Period

'''Manderon Period''' was an era of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] which lasted from [[7000 BBY]] to [[5000 BBY/Legends|5000 BBY]] and reached its height some [[6000 BBY/Legends|6,000 years]] before the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. It was marked by a "trio" of discoveries which changed the fate of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].

The [[Exiles]] discovered the [[Sith Empire/Legends|Sith Empire]]. The [[Corellian Trade Spine/Legends|Corellian Trade Spine]] was completed by [[5500 BBY/Legends|5500 BBY]]. Simultaneously the [[Herglic/Legends|Herglics]] and [[Givin/Legends|Givin]] form the [[Rimma Trade Route/Legends|Rimma Trade Route]] out of pre-existing [[praedium]]s.

==History==
The [[Hundred-Year Darkness/Legends|Hundred-Year Darkness]] is fought during the first century of this period.

According to legend, the [[Mandalorian Crusaders]] were formed around the beginning of this period on the planet [[Mandalore/Legends|Mandalore]] by the [[Taung/Legends|Taung]], [[Mandalore the First]].

[[Mrlsst/Legends|Mrlsst]] and [[Dorin/Legends|Dorin]] join the Republic during this period.

[[Jatz/Legends|Jatz]] musical style is believed to have been popular during the Manderon Period. Also, artisan [[Andel Tanner]] lived during this period.

The [[Cold Coil]] made an incursion from the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]] into [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] territory early in the Manderon Period. They were repelled by forces led by [[Enos Ozzel]].<ref name="Star Wars: Imperial Handbook: A Commander's Guide">''[[Star Wars: Imperial Handbook: A Commander's Guide]]''</ref>

*[[7000 BBY]]
**[[Dathka Graush]] initiates a period of civil war on Korriban<ref name="TEA" /> upon ascending to the throne.<ref name="Korriban">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20031002korriban|text=Korriban: Planet of Lost Souls|int=Korriban: Planet of Lost Souls}}</ref>
**The [[Manderon Period]] begins.<ref name="TEA" />
**The [[Hundred-Year Darkness/Legends|Hundred-Year Darkness]] begins in the aftermath of the Second Great Schism.<ref name="Jedi vs. Sith">[[Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force (real-life book)|''Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force'']]</ref>
**The [[Taung/Legends|Taung]] [[Mandalore the First]] leads his followers from the planet [[Roon/Legends|Roon]] to a new world, which his followers rename [[Mandalore/Legends|Mandalore]] in his honor. {{Circa}}<ref name="TEA" />
*The Sith library [[Veeshas Tuwan]] is established on [[Arkania/Legends|Arkania]].<ref name="Essential Alien">[[The Essential Guide to Alien Species (real-world book)|''The Essential Guide to Alien Species'']]</ref>
*[[6950 BBY]]
**Dathka Graush's reign comes to an end with his death at the hands of assassins.<ref name="Korriban" />
*[[6900 BBY]]
**The Hundred-Year Darkness comes to an end with the [[Battle of Corbos]]. The defeated Dark Jedi are [[Exiles|exiled]] from the Republic.<ref name="TEA" />
**The Exiles discover the [[Sith Empire/Legends|Sith Empire]] on Korriban, which they quickly conquer and transform into a Force-using magocracy.<ref name="TEA" />
*[[6740 BBY]]
**The crystal world of [[Mygeeto/Legends|Mygeeto]] is discovered by the Republic.<ref name="TEA" />
*[[6700s BBY]]
**The Mandalorians drive the [[Fenelar]] species to extinction after raiding the planet [[Fenel]], and they arm themselves with Fenelar technology.<ref name="EGW" />
*c. 6600s BBY
**The [[Unidentified Iokath species|species]] that built the artificial planet [[Iokath]] deploys their machines on test environments throughout [[Wild Space]] in a series of experiments.
*[[6100s BBY]]
**The planet [[Tlön]] is depopulated and its surface largely incinerated by this time after centuries of conflict between the Mandalorians and the [[Tlönian]]s.
*[[6100 BBY]]
**The planet [[Saleucami/Legends|Saleucami]] is first colonized.<ref name="TEA" />
*c. [[6000 BBY/Legends|6000 BBY]]
**The planet [[Ession]] has been settled by this time.<ref name="TEA" />
**Intelligent life appears on the planet [[Altiria/Anarris]] in the form of the [[Altiri/Legends|Altiri]] and [[Anarrian]]s.<ref name="Unknown Regions">''[[The Unknown Regions]]''</ref>
*[[5975 BBY]]
**The planet [[Dorin/Legends|Dorin]], home of the [[Kel Dor/Legends|Kel Dor]], joins the Republic.<ref name="Jedi vs. Sith" />
*c. [[5956 BBY]]
**Arkanian heavy pistol
*c. [[5500 BBY/Legends|5500 BBY]]
**The [[Rimma Trade Route/Legends|Rimma Trade Route]] is established by [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] and [[Givin/Legends|Givin]] theorists, ushering in widespread colonization of the southern galaxy.<ref name="TEA" />
**The [[Corellian Trade Spine/Legends|Corellian Trade Spine]] is fully established, extending the ancient hyperroute that links Corellia and Duro all the way out to the edge of the galaxy.<ref name="TEA" />
*[[5451 BBY]]
**The [[Pathandr Fury]] occurs as the [[Mandalorian Crusaders]] raid Republic settlements.<ref name="EGW" />
*c. [[5300 BBY]]
**The Jedi Order establishes a training center on the planet [[Mustafar/Legends|Mustafar]].<ref name="TEA" />
**The underground city on [[Taris/Legends|Taris]], that will be known much later as the [[Promised Land]] is completed.
*[[5130s BBY]]
**The [[Nakat Incursions]], a border conflict instigated by the Mandalorians, occurs.<ref name="EGW" />
*[[5113 BBY]]<ref name="Revan">''[[The Old Republic: Revan]]''</ref>
**[[Tenebrae]], the illegitimate son of the Sith Lord [[Dramath]] and a poor [[Tenebrae's mother|farm woman]], is born on the planet [[Nathema]].<ref name="Revan" />

*[[5103 BBY]]<ref name="Revan" />
**Tenebrae kills Lord Dramath and embarked on a conquest of Nathema.<ref name="Revan" />

*[[5100 BBY/Legends|5100 BBY]]<ref name="Revan" />
**[[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Marka Ragnos]] appoints Tenebrae ruler of Nathema, granting him the title of Lord Vitiate.<ref name="Revan" />

*[[5010 BBY]]
**[[Teta/Legends|Teta]] ascends to the throne of the planet Koros Major and soon begins the [[Unification Wars (Koros)/Legends|Unification Wars]] in an attempt to unite the seven worlds of the [[Empress Teta system/Legends|Koros system]] under her rule.<ref name="TEA" />

*[[5000 BBY/Legends|5000 BBY]]
**The Unification Wars come to an end, with the Koros system united under [[Empress/Legends|Empress]] Teta's rule.<ref name="TEA" />
**The [[Great Hyperspace War/Legends|Great Hyperspace War]]—a galactic conflict between the Galactic Republic and the Sith Empire—erupts when two young hyperspace scouts, [[Gav Daragon|Gav]] and [[Jori Daragon]], accidentally make contact with the Sith.<ref name="TEA" />
**The Manderon Period comes to an end.<ref name="TEA" />
